greeting.line: Don't stare. You'll notice the differences, and then you won't sleep.
greeting.line_friendly: You can stare. I'll tell you which pause is yours.
greeting.line_hostile: Stop looking. You won't sleep either way.

lore.line: Check your own footage sometime. The pauses. The little errands you don't remember running. One of us is losing time, and I know which one I'd bet on.
